headline: 4 ETFs That Mirror Warren Buffett’s Buy-and-Hold Strategy in 2026

headline: Why Millions of Investors Are Buying the Wrong NASDAQ ETF
summary: Most investors seeking Nasdaq exposure reach for QQQ without hesitation. It’s the most traded ETF in the world, liquid, and synonymous with tech growth. The problem is that QQQ tracks the Nasdaq-100, which holds only the 100 largest non-financial companies on the exchange. That’s a narrow slice of a market with thousands of listed companies, ... headline: History Suggests Stocks Could Surprise to the Upside Under President Donald Trump

headline: TSMC likely to book fourth straight quarter of record profit on insatiable AI demand
summary: TSMC, the world's largest manufacturer of advanced artificial intelligence chips, will likely notch up a fourth consecutive quarter ‌of record earnings with a 50% surge in net profit for January-March thanks to ‌booming demand for AI infrastructure.  Analysts say that demand for Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co's 3-nanometre technology to produce AI chips and its ​advanced packaging technology continues to outstrip the firm's current production capacity.  Its market capitalisation is now nearly double that of South Korean rival Samsung Electronics at around $1.6 trillion.

Its market capitalisation is now nearly double that of South Korean rival Samsung Electronics at around $1.6 trillion.
